subcodes.first_line: O thou who art drawn to this Most Exalted Word, which shineth even as the supreme Luminary in the horizon of the heaven of inner meanings, fix thy gaze thereon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل باین کلمه علیا که بمثابه نیر اعظم است از برای افق سماء معانی ناظر باش
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
